channel.title: GAO Reports (sample)
channel.description: Sample gao.gov reports feed for offline scraper testing.

item.title: Artificial Intelligence: DOD Needs Stronger Governance of Machine Learning Systems
item.description: GAO reviewed the Department of Defense's governance of artificial intelligence and machine learning systems and recommended stronger oversight.

item.title: Autonomous Systems: Watchdog Reviews Acquisition Risks for Unmanned Platforms
item.description: GAO assessed acquisition and testing risks for autonomous and unmanned defense platforms.

item.title: Federal Building Maintenance: Facilities Report
item.description: A review of federal facility maintenance backlogs across agencies.
